# Sale Procurement Amendment

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! source digest: sha256:450994e13dc4f138ab6115fbfe68f2ee9ffc87b3e23d3a4f824c4ffab7267bae
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

In Odoo, when you confirm a Sale Order, you can increase the quantities
in sale lines. This is reflected in Pickings.
But, if you decrease the quantities, you have to do this manually even if
nothing has been done in any picking.

This allows to reflect confirmed sale lines quantities
amendments to procurements (and pickings) if nothing has been already begun
in stock.

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

## Installation

- Just install the module

## Usage

To use this module, you need to:

1. Create a Sale Order with at least one product and confirm it
2. Don't modify any picking
3. Decrease the product quantity in Sale Order and save
4. The quantities in pickings are changed

methods.name: odoo.addons.sale_procurement_amendment.models.stock_move.StockMove._compute_can_be_amended
documentation:
Look into operations in progress
As there is one operation in progress, move cannot be modified
as it will recompute all operations. User should start from
the beginning, that's unwanted
:return:

methods.name: odoo.addons.sale_procurement_amendment.tests.test_sale_procurement_amendment.TestSaleProcurementAmendment.test_07_two_steps
documentation:
Change operating warehouse to manage delivery steps with Pick/Ship
Create a sale order and confirm it
Change quantity to 9.0
Check original moves are cancelled and a new flow is created for
the new quantity
Repeat the operation decreasing quantity to 8.0
